title: Default or Well-Known Credentials
description: Hardcoded default credentials (admin/admin, root/root, test/test) in code or configuration files represent a critical authentication failure (OWASP A07:2021 / CWE-798).

finding.message: Default or well-known credential pattern '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Remove all default credentials from code and configuration files.
Require credential rotation on first use for any system-provisioned accounts.
Use a secrets manager to provision credentials; never hardcode them.
Add pre-commit hooks to scan for known credential patterns.
